activated_rules.rule_name: LC exception deactivated due to absence of LC reference
Consignor verified by presence in invoice text (conglomerate structure)
Consignor country must match exactly after normalization
Consignee identification via invoice's Bill To / Notify field priority
General goods description allowed with invoice reference
Manual review if quantity missing in invoice but no contradiction
EU origin normalization and additional EU member states in invoice allowed

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'mfiber AB' from certificate is explicitly found in invoice text including address and country (Sweden) with allowed normalization (case, spacing, minor typographic differences). Country matches exactly after normalization. This satisfies the requirement for consignor verification via presence in invoice document (4.1.0) and exact country match (4.1.4).

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'CENTURY GATE CO. LTD' in certificate is found in invoice 'Bill To / Notify' and 'Ship To / Consignee' fields with allowed normalization for case and punctuation. Address and country (Saudi Arabia) match exactly after normalization. Consignee verification is thus successful using invoice primary consignee fields.

goods_description.certificate_value:
PAPER IN REELS
gross weight = net weight
Shipped in container(s)
293 reels of MG Bleached Kraft
goods_description.invoice_value:
MG Bleached Kraft, 80 gsm, 74 cm
MG Bleached Kraft, 80 gsm, 102 cm
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a general goods description 'Paper in reels' with a specific mention of 293 reels of MG Bleached Kraft. Invoice specifies 'MG Bleached Kraft' products with 2 reel variants, quantities and specifications. Certificate also contains an explicit invoice reference number and date (INV-000125, 2025-11-05), which matches the invoice. Under rule 4.3.5, general goods description with invoice reference is allowed. However, verification of product description against invoice lines cannot be conclusively determined without semantic interpretation, so result is MANUAL_REVIEW.

quantity.motivation: Certificate specifies gross/net weight as 150,695 kg (interpreted as 150.695 metric tons). Invoice total confirms 150.6950 MT. Allowed normalization from kg to MT units with decimal matching performed. Weight matches exactly within tolerance, satisfying quantity verification.

origin.motivation: Origin 'India' is explicitly stated as Country of Origin in certificate (box 3) and is explicitly found in invoice under 'Country of Origin' field. Normalization rules allow this exact country match. Therefore, origin verification is successful.

manual_review_triggers: Control point goods_description requires manual review due to general product description with invoice reference.
Overall confidence below threshold for auto approval.
overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points except goods description match. Goods description contains a general term with invoice reference, which mandates manual review as semantic interpretation is needed. Other points including consignor, consignee, quantity, and origin are confirmed matching.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alle uppgifter i certifikatet kan identifieras i fakturan förutom varubeskrivningen, som är generell och kräver manuell granskning. Därför behövs ytterligare manuell kontroll före godkännande.
